# MAG Beverages

> MAG Beverages makes the Spirited Kava Infuser bottle and Spirited Kava Shot — premium functional non-alcoholic drinks combining noble kava extract, ashwagandha, L-theanine, and Vitamin C. No THC, no CBD, no kratom. Third-party tested. Wholesale available nationwide through Airgoods.

MAG Beverages is based in St. Louis, MO and was founded in 2024. Products are stocked at NA bars, bottle shops, smoke shops, and wellness retailers across the United States.

## Products

- **Spirited Kava Infuser** (750ml bottle) — Noble kava extract, ashwagandha, L-theanine, Vitamin C. Best seller. Available wholesale.
- **Spirited Kava Shot** (2oz shot) — Same functional stack in a grab-and-go format. Available wholesale.
- **Kava Cola** — Kava + organic caffeine + terpene essential oils
- **Kava Paloma** — Kava + organic caffeine + terpene essential oils

## Wholesale

Order through Airgoods: https://airgoods.com/u/mag-beverages
Low minimums. Ships nationwide. No long-term commitment required.

## Retail Locations

Active in 9 states: California, Colorado, Georgia, Indiana, Missouri, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Tennessee, Texas.
Use the store locator at https://magbeverages.com to find the nearest stockist.

Science-backed ingredient research published by MAG Beverages.
